blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 41.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 17" over the past week. Current depth: 44".
